subject: [PATCH v5 09/18] mm: add MM_CP_UFFD_RWP change_protection() flag

reviews.author: SeongJae Park
reviews.summary:
Gave Reviewed-by

Reviewer noted that the patch description does not mention the Reviewed-by tag given by Mike Rapoport, and suggested adding it to the Signed-off-by section.

2026-05-28.patch_summary: This patch adds two new flags to the change_protection() function: MM_CP_UFFD_RWP and MM_CP_UFFD_RWP_RESOLVE. The first flag installs a PAGE_NONE PTE with the uffd bit set, which distinguishes it from a plain mprotect(PROT_NONE) or NUMA hinting fault. The second flag restores the original vma->vm_page_prot and clears the uffd bit. These flags are used for userfaultfd RWP (Read-Write Protection) and are wired through various change_protection() functions to ensure consistent semantics across different memory types, including anonymous, shmem, THP, and hugetlb.
